ogTitle: Kwelkan vs Kwinana Town Centre: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kwelkan and Kwinana Town Centre.
heading: Kwelkan vs Kwinana Town Centre — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kwelkan, Western Australia and Kwinana Town Centre, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kwelkan has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to Kwinana Town Centre (33/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kwelkan or Kwinana Town Centre safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kwelkan has a flood risk score of 30/100, while Kwinana Town Centre scores 43/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kwelkan scores 21/100 for bushfire risk. Kwinana Town Centre scores 16/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kwelkan or Kwinana Town Centre?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kwelkan has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.38% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
